name: Crypto-Knowledge Security
description: Anti-rug token scanner for AI agents: screen any token before buying, on EVM chains (Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, BNB, Avalanche and more) and Solana. Cross-checks GoPlus static analysis with a live honeypot.is buy/sell simulation and returns a 0-100 risk score with concrete red flags: honeypot status, buy/sell taxes, liquidity locks, mint/freeze/blacklist/pause powers, ownership and holder concentration.

inputs.description: POST this JSON body to the endpoint.

chain.description: Chain key: ethereum, base, arbitrum, optimism, polygon, bsc, avalanche, cronos, apechain or solana.

address.description: Token contract address (EVM) or mint address (Solana).

outputs.description: Uniform envelope with the scan report.

data.description: riskScore (0-100), verdict, redFlags[], checks (honeypot, taxes, liquidity, permissions, holders), dataSources[]

requirements.label: Hold >=1 Normies NFT (ERC-721, Ethereum) for free access; otherwise pay $0.10 USDC per request via x402 on Base. Enforced on-chain by the canonical ERC721OwnerPredicate.

io.opensea.access.description: Holding a Normies NFT grants free access. Non-holders pay $0.10 USDC per request via x402 on Base.

io.opensea.display.title: Crypto-Knowledge Security
io.opensea.display.subtitle: Anti-rug token scanner — 0-100 risk score across 10 chains
